title: CLI: apply unpad() in MLS-decrypted broadcast receive path
description:
What: Strip bucket padding from the decrypted MLS plaintext in cli/src/commands.rs before deserializing as ClearMessage.

Algorithm:
1. Add to imports: use nie_core::messages::unpad;
2. Find all sites where mls.process() or mls.process_for_group() returns Some(plaintext_bytes):
   a. DELIVER handler: after process_incoming returns Ok(Some(pt)) -> let pt = unpad(&pt)?;
   b. SEALED_DELIVER handler: after MLS decrypt -> unpad
   c. GROUP_DELIVER handler: after process_for_group returns Ok(Some(pt)) -> unpad
   d. WHISPER_DELIVER handler (MLS case): after decrypt -> unpad
3. For the non-MLS path (plaintext path, mls_active == false): do NOT unpad — these payloads were never padded.
4. On unpad() Err (malformed padding): warn!() and continue (skip this message; not a crash)

Defensive rules:
- Only call unpad() on MLS-decrypted payloads, never on raw plaintext
- On unpad() Err: warn! and continue (malformed message from peer); do not crash or disconnect
- Do not log the decrypted bytes

Team: standard R+I+T
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-cli passes; cargo clippy -p nie-cli -- -D warnings passes; unpad() called before serde_json::from_slice in all MLS-decrypted paths
